entry.title: New: CR 25-24 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 16 (2025), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement with the State Department of Labor and Industrial Relations, Hawai‘i Occupational Safety and Health Division, for the settlement of alleged violations at the Kihei Wastewater Reclamation Facility totaling $28,062.30.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
